ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tenders" (
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tender */,
  "tender_name" TEXT /* Name of the tender */,
  "tender_type" TEXT /* Type of tender (e.g., construction, services, goods) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the tender was issued */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the tender closes */,
  "evaluation_criteria" TEXT /* Evaluation criteria for the tender */,
  "tender_status" TEXT /* Current status of the tender (e.g., open, closed, awarded, cancelled) */,
  "evaluation_weightage" TEXT /* Weightage of technical and pricing scores in the evaluation process */,
  "winning_bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning bid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenders_winning_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bidders" (
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bidder */,
  "bidder_name" TEXT /* Name of the bidder */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the bidder */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the bidder */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Company address of the bidder */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Company website of the bidder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender the bid is for */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bidder who submitted the bid */,
  "bid_price" TEXT /* Price of the bid */,
  "bid_date" TEXT /* Date the bid was submitted */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bid (e.g., submitted, evaluated, awarded, rejected) */,
  "bid_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the bid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_tender_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_id") REFERENCES tenders ("tender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator who assigned the score */,
  "technical_score" TEXT /* Technical score assigned to the bid */,
  "pricing_score" TEXT /* Pricing score assigned to the bid */,
  "total_score" TEXT /* Total score assigned to the bid */,
  "evaluation_comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback from the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the evaluator */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the evaluator in years */,
  "evaluation_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluator_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender the evaluator is assigned to */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluator was assigned to the tender */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the assignment (e.g., assigned, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluator_assignments_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluator_assignments_tender_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_id") REFERENCES tenders ("tender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., tender notice, evaluation criteria, bidder submission) */,
  "document_upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_tender_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_id") REFERENCES tenders ("tender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was determined */,
  "outcome_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the outcome */,
  "outcome_comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback on the outcome */,
  "outcome_status" TEXT /* Current status of the outcome (e.g., awarded, rejected, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_tender_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_id") REFERENCES tenders ("tender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tender administrator, evaluator, bidder) */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
